basic_details.job_title: NIT Sikkim Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Sikkim (NIT Sikkim) has released the official Project Research Scientist (PRS) Notification 2026 on the official website of National Institute of Technology Sikkim. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the NIT Sikkim Project Research Scientist (PRS) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology or equivalent qualification and a maximum age limit of 35 years can apply through Email mode on or before 18-05-2026. The official notification PDF and application details are

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Relaxation will be given as per the Govt. of India norms.

qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. (or Integrated M.Tech.) in Computer Sc. & Engg. / Information Technology or equivalent from an Institute of National Importance / AICTE-approved University/Institution with minimum 65% marks or 7.0 CGPA (out of 10) in M.E./M.Tech. OR B.E./B.Tech. from an Institute of National Importance with minimum 85% marks or 9.0 CGPA (out of 10). For SC/ST/PwD candidates, a relaxation of 5% marks or 0.5 CGPA will be considered. Desirable: GATE/NET qualification, proficiency in computer programming.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Sikkim Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Sikkim Project Research Scientist (PRS) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 18th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Research Scientist (PRS) post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering or Information Technology, with specific marks or CGPA requirements. GATE/NET qualification is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Research Scientist (PRS) post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the salary for the Project Research Scientist (PRS) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 56,000/- per month, plus 10% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the NIT Sikkim PRS recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Project Research Scientist (PRS) post?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Research Scientist (PRS) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job as a Project Research Scientist (PRS) at NIT Sikkim.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The link to download the official notification PDF can be found in the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Research Scientist (PRS) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Research Scientist (PRS) position announced by NIT Sikkim.
